projects.title: AI-driven Lead generation & Cold Outreach Automation
projects.stack: Python, Google sheets, Google Apps script, OpenAI API, Google Workspace Studio, OpenClaw
bullets: Built an end-to-end agentic workflow automation pipeline to detect newly funded startups, scrape and enrich company data, identify decision-makers, and generate structured cold outreach drafts with minimal manual intervention.
Designed qualification logic, lead documentation schemas, and human-in-the-loop review checkpoints.
Achieved approximately 15% response rate and 5% lead rate while limiting manual effort to final editing and validations.
Extending the system into an AI assistant with subagent workers using OpenClaw, Telegram, and automated Linear issue creation for high-priority opportunities.

projects.title: [Claude Code] Gamified Job Application Tracker
projects.stack: Expo, React Native, Android APK production build
bullets: Built a mobile job application tracking app to centralize opportunity data, track progression, and support accountability through an engaging gaming loop.
Developed the app through Expo with AI-assisted iteration, produced an Android APK build, and deployed it to my own phone for daily use.
Designed the tool as a lightweight personal operations system replacing fragmented notes and spreadsheet-based tracking.

projects.title: Behavioral Analysis & Client Segmentation from Server Logs
bullets: Processed and structured over 1B rows of noisy server log data to isolate relevant user actions, standardize events, and build analysis-ready dataset.
Applied sequence mining algorithms to extract high-value features from user sessions and convert raw interaction traces into interpretable behavioral signals.
Performed behavioral analysis and client segmentation by clustering users based on mined session features, uncovering 8 distinct behavioral archetypes for downstream product and business analysis.

Built an end-to-end meeting intelligence pipeline in Python combining speech-to-text, speaker diarization, transcript segmentation, action-item extraction, and retrieval-augmented generation for searchable meeting analysis.
Owned the full preprocessing and transcript structuring stack, including audio cleaning, chunking, segmentation, embeddings, and output formatting for downstream retrieval workflows.
Improved multi-speaker transcript quality by tuning diarization thresholds and refining segmentation and embedding strategies, increasing readability and downstream retrieval usefulness.
Produced navigable meeting outputs with chaptered transcripts, structured summaries, and chatbot retrieval over meeting content.
Compared SOTA computer vision segmentation models for multimodal obstacle detection, including DeepLab, SegFormer, and YOLO variants.
Evaluated trade-offs across inference speed, accuracy, and hardware cost to support architecture decisions for constrained deployment scenarios.
Synthesized metrics, model behavior, and product constraints into rigorous weekly reports for startup founders, linking technical findings to real deployment choices.
Built and debugged Tableau dashboards for clients in marketing and operations, integrating data sources, translating raw data into KPI frameworks, reporting logic, and decision-ready views.
Optimized calculations, data-source structure, and dashboard performance to improve refresh speed, usability, and reporting reliability.
Worked directly with clients to validate metrics, and iterate on analytical deliverables with practical decision-making in mind.
